positive: A minimalist, abstract representation of a mountain range at dawn. The style should be flat design, using only three complementary colors (e.g., terracotta, slate grey, cream). The lines must be clean, geometric, and highly scalable, suitable for embroidery or vinyl decals. Japanese Ukiyo-e influence.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements
